author: Jordan M.
title: Exactly what streetwear should be
body: This tee hits different. The weight is perfect — not flimsy, not stiff. Oversized fit is on point without looking sloppy. Wore it to a show last week and got three compliments. Already ordered another colour.

author: Kai T.
title: Premium quality, no cap
body: Didn't expect this level of quality at this price. Fabric is thick and structured. Washed it twice and it hasn't shrunk or faded. The boxy cut is exactly as shown. Will be back.

author: Asha R.
title: Great tee, sizing runs slightly big
body: Love the quality and the look. Just be aware the sizing runs a touch bigger than expected — I usually wear M but an S would have worked. Still keeping it though, the oversized look is intentional anyway.

author: Luca V.
title: Best hoodie I've bought this year
body: Heavyweight, structured, and the fit is immaculate. The colour hasn't faded at all. Warm enough for UK winters but not too bulky. I've been wearing this on repeat.

author: Sam W.
title: Honestly exceeded expectations
body: Was sceptical ordering from a new brand but DEKKRY delivered. The hoodie is thick, the stitching is clean, no loose threads. Customer service was quick too when I had a question about sizing.

author: Priya K.
title: Solid hoodie, fast delivery
body: Really happy with this. The grey colourway is a perfect neutral — goes with everything. Delivery was super fast too. Taking off one star only because the pocket lining could be thicker.

author: Tyler B.
title: These cargos are it
body: Fit, fabric, details — everything is on point. The pockets are actually functional and the taper is perfect. Not too baggy, not too slim. Styled them with the DEKKRY tee and the fit was fire.

author: Nadia A.
title: Finally a cargo that fits right
body: I've tried a lot of cargos and these are the best fit I've found. The waistband is comfortable and the taper sits exactly right. Already ordered in khaki too.

author: Marcus J.
title: Statement piece, actually wearable
body: Loads of jackets claim to be statement pieces but they never work in practice. This one actually does. Clean enough to dress up, bold enough to stand out. Quality is excellent.

author: Elena S.
title: Great quality, runs a bit small
body: Love the jacket. The material feels premium and the cut is clean. Only thing — size up. I'm usually an M and the L fits perfectly. Once you get the sizing right it's a 5-star piece.

author: Demi O.
title: The joggers I've been looking for
body: Soft, structured, and they actually hold their shape after washing. The fit is athletic but relaxed — perfect for the gym or just out. Bought two pairs.

author: Finn C.
title: Comfort + style, rare combo
body: These are genuinely the most comfortable joggers I own but they don't look like lazy wear. The fit is tailored enough to wear out. Material is thick and doesn't pill.

author: Zayn M.
title: Clean graphic, quality print
body: Graphic tees are hit or miss but this one is clean. The print hasn't cracked after multiple washes, the fit is great, and the graphic is subtle enough to pair with anything.

author: Rosa T.
title: Great shorts for summer
body: Really happy with these. The length is perfect — not too long, not too short. Fabric is a nice mid-weight. Would give 5 stars if the waistband drawstring was slightly longer.

author: Chris N.
title: Vest that actually fits well
body: Finally a vest with a proper fit — not too wide, not too tight. The fabric has a nice weight to it. Wearing it layered over the hoodie and it looks great.

author: Kai T.
title: Best tee I own
body: Bought this on a whim and it's now my most worn piece. The cotton is thick and holds its shape after washing. The boxy fit is perfect — not too baggy, just right.

author: Lena W.
title: Great quality, sizing runs big
body: Really love the fabric weight. Goes a size up so order down if you're between sizes. Still looks amazing styled with wide pants.

author: Damien O.
title: Didn't expect this quality for the price
body: Genuinely shocked. This feels like it should cost £90. The stitching is clean, the drop shoulder is exactly where it should be. Will be buying more.

author: Priya S.
title: Elevated every outfit
body: Wore this under an overshirt and it looked chef's kiss. The stripes are crisp and the fabric doesn't pill after washing. Definitely buying another colour if they drop one.

author: Tobias F.
title: Solid piece
body: Good weight, nice stripe pattern. Fits true to size. Could be slightly longer but overall very happy with it.

author: Aisha K.
title: Obsessed
body: This has become my go-to layering piece. The cotton feels premium and it doesn't shrink in the wash. Already recommended it to 3 friends.

author: Marcus B.
title: The hoodie I've been looking for
body: Heavy, structured, and the arch graphic is clean without being loud. Exactly what I wanted. The kangaroo pocket is deep and the drawstrings don't fall out. 10/10.

author: Nora L.
title: Worth every penny
body: I've bought cheap hoodies before and regretted it. This one is properly thick — perfect for autumn and winter. The fit is immaculate. Already on my second one.

author: Sam R.
title: Really good hoodie
body: Great quality and the arch logo looks sick in person. Took one star off only because delivery took a bit longer than expected, but the product itself is excellent.

author: Tyler J.
title: Perfect summer short
body: These are the shorts I reach for first every time. Comfortable, the right length, and the branding is subtle enough to wear anywhere. Machine wash no issues.

author: Freya M.
title: Good fit, nice material
body: Wore these on a long day out and they stayed comfortable the whole time. Would love a longer inseam option but otherwise great.

author: Carlos V.
title: Clean cap, perfect fit
body: The structured front keeps its shape and the logo embroidery is sharp. Adjustable strap fits perfectly. Looks expensive but isn't.

author: Jade H.
title: My favourite cap right now
body: Bought this to go with my DEKKRY tee and it works perfectly. The logo placement is spot on. Quality stitching, no loose threads. Very happy.

author: Remi A.
title: These are statement pieces
body: The silhouette is incredible. Flowy but structured, and the fabric drapes beautifully. Styled with the DEKKRY tee and got stopped twice in one day. Worth it.

author: Isla C.
title: Love the fit
body: Really wide leg but in a good way — very on trend right now. Runs slightly long so might need a small hem if you're shorter. Otherwise perfect.

author: Noah G.
title: Instant outfit upgrade
body: This vest transforms any basic fit into something interesting. The pockets are actually functional and the zips feel solid. Great layering piece year round.

author: Zara P.
title: So versatile
body: Worn this over a hoodie, over a tee, even over a long sleeve. It works every time. The cut is clean and it holds its shape well. Brilliant piece.

author: Ben K.
title: Underrated piece
body: The thermal texture looks sick and it actually keeps you warm. Fits slim but not tight. I wear it solo or as a base layer under the DEKKRY hoodie. Perfect combo.

author: Mei T.
title: Great quality thermal
body: Nice texture and the fit is good. The ribbed cuffs and hem look premium. Only thing — I wish it came in more colours. Would buy again.

author: Finn O.
title: Wearing this every week
body: Grabbed this as an afterthought with my order and it's become one of my most worn pieces. Washes perfectly, keeps its shape. The thermal pattern is a nice detail.
